title: Marantz Expands Its Premium Hifi Separates Offerings with Three New Releases
bodyHtml:
Marantz Expands Its Premium Hifi Separates Offerings with Three New Releases

Marantz has announced the release of three new products that further expand its selection in the premium range of hifi separates options. The new products include the MODEL 10 amplifier, the Marantz Horizon and Grand Horizon, and the MODEL M1 and M4 streaming amplifiers.

‍

‍

The MODEL 10 is a new reference in amplifier design. Featuring a newly designed dual-mono symmetrical amplifier topology, it is the most powerful, highest performing Marantz amplifier ever. It is priced at $15,000.00.

The Marantz Horizon is a new wireless streaming amplifier that delivers a superior listening experience via an intuitive user interface. It is priced at $3,500.00.

The MODEL M1 is a new wireless streaming amplifier that is engineered with performance and versatility in mind. It is priced at $1,000.00.

These three new products are a welcome addition to Marantz's lineup of high-end audio equipment. They are sure to be popular with audiophiles and music lovers alike.

‍

‍

Here are some of the key features of the new products:

  • MODEL 10:
    • Newly designed dual-mono symmetrical amplifier topology
    • 250 Watts per channel
    • All-New Marantz SMPS
    • Fully balanced dual mono amplifiers
    • Phono MM/MC
    • Copper-plated chassis

‍

  • Marantz Horizon and Grand Horizon
    • Marantz Rise™ Amplifier
    • Marantz Radiance™ 360° Seamless Fabric
    • Marantz AuraControl™
    • Marantz Mirage™ DSP
    • HEOS® Built-in
    • Elegant, intuitive user interface

‍

  • MODEL M1 and M44
    • 2.1 Channels
    • 100 Watts per Channel
    • HDMI eARC
    • Dolby Digital+
    • HEOS Built-in

‍

Marantz is a well-known brand for its high-quality audio equipment. The company has been in business for over 70 years, and it is committed to providing its customers with the best possible products. The three new products announced today are a testament to Marantz's commitment to innovation and excellence.

The new products are now available for purchase from authorized Marantz dealers, such as AVIR, Inc. in Palm Desert.

I would also like to add that these three new products are an excellent complement to Marantz's recent 2024 releases. The company has been on a roll lately, and these new products are sure to continue to impress audiophiles and music lovers around the world.
